evaluations.query: Implement a distributed lock using Redis for payment processing
expected_behavior: Uses Lua scripts for atomic acquire/release
Uses atomic acquire via Lua script with owner and ttl_ms parameters
Validates owner ID before release to prevent accidental lock theft
Describes Redlock quorum for HA across multiple independent Redis instances

evaluations.query: Use PostgreSQL advisory locks for a singleton cron job
expected_behavior: Uses pg_try_advisory_lock for non-blocking acquire to avoid blocking callers
Distinguishes session-level vs transaction-level locks for appropriate scope selection
Converts string names to bigint lock IDs via hash
Shows monitoring query with pg_locks for active lock visibility and debugging

evaluations.query: Add heartbeat extension and fencing to a distributed lock
expected_behavior: Sets TTL on lock to prevent deadlocks
Includes background heartbeat/extend task to keep long-running locks alive automatically
Validates owner ID on all operations
Uses retry with exponential backoff on acquire

evaluations.query: Add a circuit breaker to an external API integration
expected_behavior: Implements CLOSED/OPEN/HALF_OPEN state machine for progressive failure recovery
Uses sliding window for failure tracking
Provides fallback response when circuit is open
Includes state change observability callbacks for monitoring circuit breaker transitions

evaluations.query: Implement retry with exponential backoff for an HTTP client
expected_behavior: Uses exponential backoff with full jitter
Classifies errors as retryable vs non-retryable
Sets max attempts and max delay cap
Places retry inside circuit breaker, not outside

evaluations.query: Isolate critical and optional operations with bulkheads
expected_behavior: Uses semaphore-based concurrency control to limit parallel resource consumption per tier
Defines tiers: Critical, Standard, Optional with isolated resource allocation boundaries
Configures queue size and timeout per tier
Includes rejection policy handling for graceful degradation when capacity is exceeded

evaluations.query: Make a POST payment endpoint idempotent
expected_behavior: Accepts Idempotency-Key header from client to enable safe request retry behavior
Generates deterministic keys via SHA-256 hash
Caches successful responses in Redis for fast idempotent replay on retries
Returns cached response with X-Idempotent-Replayed header

evaluations.query: Deduplicate event processing in a Kafka consumer
expected_behavior: Checks Redis cache for fast dedup
Falls back to database for durability
Uses database unique constraint to prevent races
Tracks processed events with idempotency keys

evaluations.query: Implement database-backed idempotency with TTL cleanup
expected_behavior: Creates idempotency_records table with unique key
Uses ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING for upsert
Sets expires_at for TTL-based cleanup to prevent unbounded idempotency record growth
Validates request body hash to detect misuse

evaluations.query: Implement token bucket rate limiting with Redis
expected_behavior: Uses atomic Lua script for check-and-consume
Calculates token refill based on elapsed time
Returns allowed status and retry_after seconds
Sets appropriate EXPIRE on bucket key

evaluations.query: Implement precise sliding window rate limiting
expected_behavior: Uses Redis sorted sets with timestamps as scores
Removes expired entries with ZREMRANGEBYSCORE to maintain sliding window accuracy
Counts current window with ZCARD to determine remaining request allowance
Avoids fixed window boundary spike issues

evaluations.query: Add tiered rate limiting to a FastAPI application
expected_behavior: Configures SlowAPI with Redis backend for distributed rate limit state sharing
Defines per-tier limits (free/pro/enterprise) with distinct rate allowances per plan
Returns standard rate limit headers (X-RateLimit-*)
Returns 429 with Retry-After header when exceeded

evaluations.query: Implement edge caching with Cloudflare Workers KV and proper cache invalidation for our API responses.
expected_behavior: Sets Cache-Control headers with max-age and stale-while-revalidate for API responses
Uses CDN-Cache-Control to set different TTLs for CDN versus browser caching
Stores responses in Cloudflare KV with expirationTtl for TTL-based cache expiry
Adds Vary header for content that changes by user authentication or locale
Never caches authenticated or personalized responses without private directive or Vary header

evaluations.query: Deploy a Cloudflare Worker that handles geo-based routing and authentication using Web Crypto API.
expected_behavior: Uses Web APIs like fetch, Request, Response, and crypto.subtle instead of Node.js modules
Avoids Node.js APIs like fs, path, and child_process which are unavailable in V8 isolates
Implements token verification using crypto.subtle.importKey with HMAC SHA-256 algorithm
Keeps bundle size under 1MB compressed for fast cold starts under 1 millisecond
Uses geo-based routing with request.cf.country for region-specific redirects

evaluations.query: Implement a transactional outbox pattern for reliable event publishing in our order service.
expected_behavior: Writes business data and outbox event in the same database transaction for atomicity
Implements a separate outbox publisher process that polls for unsent events
Uses SKIP LOCKED for safe concurrent outbox worker processing without blocking
Requires all message consumers to be idempotent using event ID deduplication
Includes saga orchestration with compensating actions for multi-step workflows

evaluations.query: Implement event sourcing with CQRS for our financial transaction system with full audit trail.
expected_behavior: Stores state changes as immutable domain events named in past tense like MoneyDeposited
Uses optimistic concurrency with version checks to prevent conflicting event writes
Implements separate CQRS read model projections for query-optimized data access
Recommends snapshotting every N events to avoid replaying long event streams on load
Uses compensating events instead of deleting events to maintain immutable event history
